allow: Bash(python -c "from tools import tv; print\('TV tool OK'\); print\('Actions:', [k['name'] for k in tv.ALL_TOOLS]\)")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: Sony BRAVIA TV control + FRED macro data + Pine Script editor' --body ':*)

Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title \\"feat: Sony BRAVIA TV control + FRED macro data + Pine Script editor\\" --body \\"## Summary\\n\\n- Sony BRAVIA TV control \(tools/tv.py\) via IRCC-IP SOAP — power, volume, mute, channels, navigation, HDMI inputs, Netflix, YouTube, Prime. Power-on from standby via REST API.\\n- FRED macro data tool \(tools/fred.py\) — GDP, unemployment, inflation, Fed rate, Treasury yields, S&P 500.\\n- TradingView Pine Script editor actions \(open/write/load/add/close\).\\n- agent.py: both tools wired into _CLIENT_TOOLS, _TOOLS, _dispatch, and system prompt.\\n- encrypt.py / decrypt.py: Fernet password utilities for main.py.\\n\\n## Sony TV Setup\\n\\n1. TV Settings > Network > IP remote control > Enable\\n2. Authentication: Normal and Pre-Shared Key, set a PSK\\n3. .env: TV_TYPE=sony, TV_IP=<local IP>, TV_PSK=<psk>\\n4. For power-on from standby: Settings > Power > Network standby > On\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Mute the TV\\n- [ ] Volume up/down\\n- [ ] Open Netflix\\n- [ ] Turn TV off/on from standby\\n- [ ] FRED: US unemployment rate\\n- [ ] TradingView: write a Pine Script indicator\\" 2>&1")
